name: Kazokucon
description:
Kazokucon is a small Oslo-based pop-culture and cosplay convention with a strong community-first ethos — the name plays on the Japanese word for "family". Programming spans anime, manga, fantasy, sci-fi, comics, video games, tabletop, cosplay and K-pop, with an emphasis on a cozy, welcoming atmosphere over scale.

Editions are themed; the upcoming 2026 edition is branded "Neon Age".
notes: Logo is the standalone mascot icon; banner is the 2026 'Neon Age' wordmark hero with the mascot.
